title: veronica minima
intro: Veronica minima, also known as small speedwell or Creeping Veronica, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Veronica minima include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
